items.lead: I contribute to the design and development of microservice-based solutions, supporting the evolution of the platform and the delivery of scalable cloud-native services.
bullets: Develop and maintain backend services with Python and FastAPI.
Design and implement cloud solutions deployed on AWS.
Take part in technical discussions on system architecture and platform evolution.

items.lead: Contributed to the development and optimization of web applications with Next.js within the Mística Design System, focusing on accessibility, SEO and performance.
bullets: Implemented accessibility (WCAG) and SEO improvements across digital products.
Built a full-stack tool (React, Express, MongoDB) to automate technical audits.
Ran technical audits and Web Performance Optimization (WPO) in agile teams.

about.heading: About
narrative: Software Engineer focused on software architecture, distributed systems, and cloud technologies, with experience in full-stack development and backend engineering.
At Génexys, I contribute to the development of microservices-based solutions using Python, FastAPI, and AWS, while participating in technical discussions and architectural decision-making.

I recently completed my Bachelor's Degree in Software Engineering by designing and shipping TripFlow ✈️, my Bachelor's Thesis (10/10): an AI-assisted travel planner with real-time collaboration and offline mode.
